name: Golfzon Range by Leadbetter
about: Golfzon Range by Leadbetter is an indoor golf simulator venue with locations in Westbury, NY and Little Ferry, NJ. The facility features advanced simulator technology, including the GDR MAX, which provides detailed swing analysis and shot tracking. They offer a range of services from individual bay rentals to memberships, lessons, and junior programs. The venue is designed for golfers of all skill levels, with packages for beginners and personalized coaching for more advanced players.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GDR MAX simulator technology for realistic play and detailed swing feedback
Beginner-friendly packages offering lessons and bay time for just $99
Leadbetter-certified instructors for personalized coaching and practice plans
Convenient mobile app for easy booking and session management

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced indoor golf simulator with high-end camera technology for swing analysis and feedback

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary use of equipment is included, especially for the beginner bundle and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on outside food or drinks, so it's recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about an hour for a single person to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, kids are welcome and the venue offers many junior programs and events, including Nike Junior Camps.
